name: Deadly Keg
description: History Before Exalt Version 5.4.0.0 (Nov 2024), this item didn’t have the Sticky Bomb trait or VIT scaling. It had a trigger radius of 3.57 tiles, an explosion radius of 5.5 tiles, and a throw time of 0.5 seconds.
effects: On enemies: Inflicts Slowed for 1.6 (+0.1s per VIT over 40) seconds
